semantic.role: Primary project documentation for ArchSpine, a mirror system for architectural documentation and governance
responsibilities: Defining the purpose and role of ArchSpine within a repository
Documenting configuration parameters, rules, and stability considerations
Guiding contributors and maintainers on how to work with the spine system
outOfScope: User-level tutorials or hands-on how-to guides

English.purpose: This document explains why ArchSpine exists, what it does, and how its configuration parameters govern the behavior of the mirror system. It establishes the responsibilities of the spine and outlines risks associated with changing the architecture documentation.
English.context_and_audience: Targeted at repository maintainers, technical leads, and AI agents that interact with the spine to enforce architectural rules and maintain documentation integrity.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine provides a mirrored documentation structure (atlas) synchronized with source code.
The spine directory (.spine) holds configuration, rules, and index data.
Maintenance involves updating configuration and rules; the system is sensitive to structural changes.
Localized documentation in multiple languages is supported via atlas language directories.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档解释了ArchSpine为什么存在、它的作用，以及配置参数如何控制镜像系统的行为。它明确了脊梁（spine）的职责，并概述了变更架构文档时可能带来的风险。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向仓库维护者、技术负责人以及与脊梁交互以实施架构规则和保持文档完整性的AI代理。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine提供一个镜像文档结构（atlas），与源代码同步。
脊梁目录（.spine）包含配置、规则和索引数据。
维护涉及更新配置和规则；系统对结构变更敏感。
通过atlas语言目录支持多语言文档。
